title: Wipro Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Wipro Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Wipro Capital India are looking for an experienced Full Stack Developer based out of Ghaziabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Wipro Capital India:
Wipro Capital India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Git
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ghaziabad, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Wipro Capital India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
